scientific_note: Event-locked EEG classifiers predict controlled dataset task labels under experimental conditions; they are not general mind-reading models.

inspection.dataset_name: PhysioNet EEG Motor Movement/Imagery local files
inspection.scientific_note: Dataset inspection summarizes metadata and annotations; it is not clinical review.

feature_summary.dataset_name: PhysioNet EEG Motor Movement/Imagery local files

classifier_shadow.scientific_note: Classifier shadow inference predicts event labels and does not adapt the corridor.

comparison.interpretation: Heuristic output is a cognitive proxy summary. The learned classifier predicts dataset task labels from event-locked EEG epochs. Neither is mind reading.
